description_long: This is a rectangular office desk with a smooth, light gray top surface and a sturdy, dark wood-textured base. The front panel is solid and extends the full width of the desk, providing privacy and structural support. On the user-facing side, there are two sets of drawers: the left side features two smaller drawers stacked vertically, while the right side has a single larger drawer, each with a metallic handle. The desk is supported by four straight, metallic legs at each corner, giving it a modern and functional appearance. The materials and design suggest durability and suitability for professional or administrative environments. The overall finish is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A modern office desk with a light gray top, dark wood-textured base, and multiple drawers with metallic handles. The design is sturdy, functional, and well-suited for professional settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing a solid wood-textured privacy panel and metallic legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth and the solid panel extending to the floor.
description_view_2: User-facing view displaying two sets of drawers with metallic handles beneath the desktop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid panel and metallic legs.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features two sets of drawers with handles, indicating this is the front; the opposite side has a solid privacy panel, while the sides are plain.
attribute_usage_context: administrative workstation or writing desk in an office environment
